items.raw_desc: Társasjáték Dabba Walla:                Deliver the food package on timeThe Dabba Walla board game takes you to Mumbai, one of the most populous cities in the world, where everyone wants to have lunch at the same time. Become Dabba Wala - a food courier that operates with 99.999% reliability and delivers without GPS and other technologies. Be part of the magic of the night, get the most valuable gems, create the most beautiful necklace and earn your place at the Imperial Court. The game Holdfens Bazaar is sophisticated, yet simple. Four rounds are played. It is not only luck that is needed to win, but also a sense of tactics, foresight and good timing. Each round has two phases.
